title: OmniDye
description: OmniDye takes the concept of universal dyeing to the next level, bringing vibrant creativity to your Minecraft world! With this datapack/Mod, you can transform any colored block into any other color (glazed terracotta excluded) effortlessly.
body:
OmniDye takes the concept of universal dyeing to the next level, bringing vibrant creativity to your Minecraft world! With this datapack, you can transform any colored block into any other color (glazed terracotta excluded) effortlessly.

Want a single block dyed to perfection? Done. Need a batch of 8 blocks ready for your colorful masterpiece? Easy. All recipes are completely shapeless, so no need to fuss over placement—just toss the items into any crafting table, and let your imagination run wild. It doesn't even matter if the block is already your target color; the power of OmniDye has you covered.

Unleash endless possibilities and paint your world with every shade imaginable!

Supported Blocks:
- Glass (excludes Tinted)
- Glass Panes (excludes Tinted)
- Wool
- Concrete
- Concrete Powder
- Banners
- Candles
- Carpets

If you find any bugs or issues please report them in the Omnidye Channel in my Discord.
